stemHtml: You are flying in RVSM airspace. What altitude deviation should be reported by the operator?

options.a: +/- 245 ft of deviation because of inaccuracy of the altimeter
options.b: +/- 200 ft of deviation because of inaccuracy of the altimeter
options.c: +/- 200 ft of deviation from true altitude
options.d: +/- 245 ft of deviation from true altitude
